Bound for Omaha

computer-assisted reporting coordinator November 1995
Investigative MethodsJournalism & Newsroom

Carol Napolitano is joining the Omaha World-Herald as a computer-assisted reporting specialist on their new public affairs reporting team, bringing her CAR expertise from her previous role at The Times in Munster, Indiana.

Carol Napolitano, formerly computer-assisted reporting coordinator at The Times in Munster, Ind., will be joining the Omaha World-Herald on Nov. 20. She will bring her CAR skills to the paper as a member of its newly created public affairs reporting team.
